zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor於1194年12月26日出生在義大利馬安科納易也希時，他的父親Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs29歲，母親Costanza von Hauteville40歲。他於1209年8月15日與Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches在義大利西西利亞梅西那結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年12月13日在義大利西西利亞享年55歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor于1194年12月26日出生在意大利馬安科納易也希时，他的父亲Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs29岁，母亲Costanza von Hauteville40岁。他于1209年8月15日与Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches在意大利西西利亞梅西那结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年12月13日在意大利西西利亞享年55岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

en.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empire

nameMeanings.name: Frederick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredrick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredric
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor was born on 26 December 1194, in Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Italy, his father, Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs, was 29 and his mother, Costanza von Hauteville, was 40. He married Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches on 15 August 1209, in Messina, Sicily, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 13 December 1250, in Sicily, Italy, at the age of 55, and was buried in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor est né le 26 décembre 1194, à Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Italie, son père, Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Costanza von Hauteville, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches le 15 août 1209, à Messina, Sicile, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1250, à Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor am 26. Dezember 1194 in Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs 29 und seine Mutter Costanza von Hauteville 40. Er hat am 15. August 1209 in Messina, Sizilien, Italien Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1250 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor è nato il il 26 dicembre 1194 nel Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Italia, il suo padre, Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Costanza von Hauteville, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches il 15 agosto 1209, nel Messina, Sicilia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 13 dicembre 1250, nel Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederick II Holy Roman Emperorが1194年12月26日にイタリアマルチェアンコナイエシで生まれた時，父Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichsは29歳，母Costanza von Hautevilleは40歳であった。1209年8月15日にイタリアシシリアメシナでConstance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reichesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年12月13日にイタリアシシリアで55歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(이)가 1194년 12월 26일 이탈리아 마체 앤코나 이시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Costanza von Hauteville(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1209년 8월 15일 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나에서 Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 12월 13일 이탈리아 시실리야에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor nasceu em 26 de dezembro de 1194, em Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Itália, seu pai, Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Costanza von Hauteville, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches em 15 de agosto de 1209, em Messina, Sicilia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1250, em Sicilia, Itália, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: аачэн, аачэнир раич, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor родился 26 декабря 1194 г. в местности иеси, анкона, марч, Италия, его отцу по имени Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Costanza von Hauteville, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches 15 августа 1209 г. в местности мессина, сисиля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 13 декабря 1250 г. в местности сисиля, Италия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor nació el 26 de diciembre de 1194, en Iesi, Ancona, Marche, Italia, su papá, Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Costanza von Hauteville, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Constance d'Aragon Kaiserin des Hl. röm. Reiches el 15 de agosto de 1209, en Messina, Sicilia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1250, en Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.
